name: Hero Summary — Emotional framing (personal, contrast-driven, curiosity hook)
focus: Strengthen emotional resonance and personal specificity

headline.romantic_high: You feel something real — but you're not moving at the same speed
headline.romantic_mid: This pull between you is genuine — the question is whether you're both ready to meet it
headline.romantic_low: The attraction is honest — but without intention, it stays still
headline.friendship_high: You understand each other in ways that don't need explaining
headline.friendship_mid: This friendship has depth — the gap is in how much you let it be seen
headline.friendship_low: You're compatible enough to matter to each other — that's worth something
headline.work_high: You work well together — the trust is there, now it's about pace
headline.work_mid: This partnership has potential — the question is who adjusts first
headline.work_low: You're functional as colleagues — bridging differences is where the work begins

oneLiner.romantic: You feel the connection — but are you building it, or just experiencing it?
oneLiner.friendship: You get each other — but how much of that are you actually sharing?
oneLiner.work: The foundation is real — what happens next depends on how you handle the gaps
